floor_history.headline: fable-blitz recon: empty-body-if confirmed cheat-shaped, but target fine structure (bnez slot=-1, j slot=+1, load-delay nop kept) is exactly the reorg own-thread-steal signature of a plain if(==0)/els

frontier.hypothesis: Replace lines 730-735 with `func_8005C650(1,0x7F,0x7F); if (D_800A3318 == 0) { result = 1; } else { result = -1; }` (no pre-call set) - expect byte-identical: bnez from ==0 branch-if-false, else-arm stolen into slot, then-arm into j slot
frontier.mechanism: jump.c branch-if-false canonicalization + reorg.c fill_slots_from_thread own-thread steal (single-insn else arm) + j-slot hoist
frontier.next_probe: sandbox func_800388A8 --disable all with the plain if/else form; diff slots at 0x290FC and 0x29104

frontier.hypothesis: If the plain if/else gives beqz or fails the steal, try the judge's spelling: keep `result = -1;` before the call + `if (D_800A3318 == 0) result = 1;` (no else) - risk is the -1 set materializing before the jal instead of deferring into the slot
frontier.mechanism: reorg.c fill_simple_delay_slots deferral of a callee-save set across the jal
frontier.next_probe: sandbox the no-else variant; check no addiu $s0,-1 appears before the jal at 0x290E8

frontier.hypothesis: If both miss, sweep the small spelling space (ternary `result = D_800A3318 ? -1 : 1;`, arm order swap, != with both arms filled) in one sweep_variants.py call
frontier.mechanism: same reorg/jump interaction; spelling determines arm layout and steal eligibility

judge_constraints: REGRESSION DIAGNOSIS (completion bar: match must land WITHOUT this construct family): Empty-body 'if (D_800A3318 != 0) { }' is a scheduling-direction cheat: semantically identical to 'if (D_800A3318 == 0) { result = 1; }' but the backwards condition + empty true body exists solely to force a bnez branch (not beqz) so GCC's delay-slot filler can hoist the pre-call 'result = -1' assignment into the bnez delay slot. Worker must rewrite with the condition un-inverted and result=-1 placed inside the if-body (or equivalent non-cheat form that produces the same scheduling naturally), then re-close.  (committed code flagged by the re-audit patrol; review and re-do in pure C if confirmed. The byte-correct construct stays on main until a clean replacement lands.)
